sources.title: Particle Data Group Review of Particle Physics 2026

sources.use: Stable citable PDG review for particle data and evaluated measurements.

sources.title: NIST CODATA Recommended Values of the Fundamental Physical Constants: 2022
sources.use: Units-bearing constants and exact SI constants for calibration rows.

sources.use: Higgs discovery evidence and mass-scale calibration surface.

sources.title: Nobel advanced information: Neutrino Oscillations
sources.use: Neutrino oscillation evidence and beyond-minimal Standard Model boundary.

sources.title: NIST Fundamental Physical Constants extensive listing
sources.use: Numerical constants, units, and uncertainty metadata for calibration tables.

sources.title: Excitons reference entry, Springer Nature
sources.use: Electron-hole, exciton, Wannier-Mott/Frenkel, binding-energy and dielectric/effective-mass formalism.

sources.title: Excitons in two-dimensional materials, arXiv:1911.00087
sources.use: Modern exciton review and material-dependent exciton evidence boundary.

sources.title: NIST CODATA inverse fine-structure constant
sources.use: Numerical alpha inverse calibration value: 137.035999177 with standard uncertainty 0.000000021.

sources.title: NIST CODATA 2022 wallet card
sources.use: Compact units and constants reference for calibration tables.

sources.title: NIST carrier dynamics by ultrafast time-resolved terahertz spectroscopy

sources.title: NIST optoelectrical characterization of photovoltaic materials and devices
sources.use: Materials lane for exciton separation into free electrons and holes at heterojunction interfaces.

sources.use: GR/continuum formalism boundary for Einstein equations as PDE/hyperbolic systems after gauge and constraint handling.
